title: Stability & UI Refinement
changes: Fixed critical TypeError in Dashboard KPI rendering.
Restored missing Licensing and Update sections in Settings.
Implemented persistent 'Save All Settings' bar for better UX.
Added missing '_logout' method to ensure navigation stability.
Optimized HWID generation for maximum machine compatibility (MAC/Registry fallback).

title: Pro-Licensing & Secure Deployment
changes: Introduced Device Binding (HWID) to restrict updates to authorized machines.
Implemented Remote License Validation via private GitHub repository.
Upgraded update engine to use secure ZIP extraction (removes Git dependency for users).
Added Licensing UI in Settings for easy machine-id discovery and key entry.
Strengthened update security using personal access tokens (PAT).

title: Industrial-Grade Self-Update System
changes: Implemented manual update check via Settings with detailed release notes preview.
Integrated Git-based synchronization for private repository support.
Added Update Review Dialog to compare versions before committing to an update.
Enhanced security by leveraging local Git authentication for private GitHub repos.
Removed background startup checks for a non-intrusive user experience.

title: System Integrity & Visual Analytics
changes: Implemented Professional Version Control System (Changelog) to track system updates.
Added 'What's New' notification for system transparency.
Enhanced shipment alert system with proactive overdue and upcoming notifications.
Refined Review Updates Dialog for surgical precision during PDF imports.
Improved visual highlighting for recently modified records in the Order List.
Optimized database backup routines for industrial-grade data safety.

title: Professional UI & Dashboard Revamp
changes: Introduced advanced visual analytics dashboard with trend charts.
Implemented donut charts for country-wise shipment distribution.
Launched 'ProToast' notification system for elegant user feedback.
Integrated circular progress visualization for shipping metrics.
Enhanced dark-mode theme with premium navy-slate palette.

title: Initial Release
changes: Core Garment Tracking System architecture deployment.
Automated PDF extraction for H&M Country Breakdown and Purchase Orders.
Multi-user authentication system with role-based permissions.
Automated SQLite database backup and management.
Advanced filtering and Excel export capabilities.
